# Results

## Incidence

During follow-up there were 120 events over 50,000 person-years, an incidence
rate of 5.0 per 1,000 person-years.

## Study population

Of 4,252 participants, 583 had missing data, leaving 3,667 in the analytic cohort.

## Risk by tier

The cohort was partitioned into three mutually exclusive risk tiers.

| Risk tier | n | events |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Low | 5,000 | 30 |
| Medium | 4,000 | 50 |
| High | 3,498 | 45 |
| Total | 12,019 | 115 |
